name: wa-api-notify
description: WhatsApp API wrapper — kirim pesan, gambar, dan dokumen via waapi.fyas.my.id

scripts.test: node -e "const { sendMessage } = require('./index.cjs'); console.log('CJS OK');" && node --input-type=module -e "import { sendMessage } from './index.mjs'; console.log('ESM OK');"
